careers.title: Full Stack Developer
careers.description: Full Stack Developers design and build both the client-facing frontend and the server-side backend of web applications. They work across the complete technology stack, from database schema design to UI implementation, and are responsible for ensuring seamless integration between all application layers. Full Stack Developers are highly valued for their versatility and ability to own an entire feature from conception to deployment.
learning_prerequisites: Basic understanding of how the internet and browsers work (HTTP, DNS, rendering)
Fundamentals of programming logic (variables, loops, conditionals, functions)
Introduction to command line and terminal usage
Basic understanding of file systems and text editors

certifications.name: IBM Full Stack Software Developer Professional Certificate

suggested_projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
suggested_projects.description: Build a fully responsive personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and contact information using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

suggested_projects.title: Full Stack Blog Application
suggested_projects.description: Build a complete blog platform with user authentication, CRUD operations for posts, a React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, and a SQL database.

suggested_projects.title: E-Commerce Web Application
suggested_projects.description: Develop a full-featured e-commerce platform with product listings, cart, user authentication, payment integration, order management, and an admin dashboard.

career_stage_path.senior_role: Senior Full Stack Engineer / Tech Lead

careers.title: Frontend Developer
careers.description: Frontend Developers build the visual and interactive layer of web applications that users directly experience. They translate UI/UX designs into responsive, accessible, and performant interfaces using modern web technologies. Frontend Developers are responsible for ensuring cross-browser compatibility, smooth user interactions, and optimal page load performance.
learning_prerequisites: Basic understanding of how browsers render web pages
Fundamentals of programming logic
Basic understanding of design principles (layout, spacing, color)
Introduction to version control concepts

certifications.name: IBM Full Stack Software Developer Professional Certificate

suggested_projects.title: Responsive Landing Page
suggested_projects.description: Design and build a fully responsive product landing page with smooth scrolling, animations, and a mobile-first layout using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

suggested_projects.title: Weather Dashboard Application
suggested_projects.description: Build a weather application that fetches live data from a public weather API, displays forecasts with dynamic UI updates, and supports city search functionality.

suggested_projects.title: Component Library with Storybook
suggested_projects.description: Design and develop a reusable React component library with TypeScript, documented using Storybook, following accessibility standards and design system principles.

careers.title: Backend Developer
careers.description: Backend Developers build and maintain the server-side logic, databases, and APIs that power web and mobile applications. They design systems for scalability, security, and reliability, handling everything from authentication and authorization to data processing and third-party integrations. Backend Developers are the engineers behind the scenes ensuring applications are fast, secure, and always available.
learning_prerequisites: Solid understanding of programming fundamentals (OOP, functions, data types)
Basic understanding of how client-server architecture works
Introduction to databases and basic SQL queries
Familiarity with command line operations

suggested_projects.title: RESTful User Authentication API
suggested_projects.description: Build a secure REST API with user registration, login, JWT-based authentication, and role-based access control using Node.js and Express.

suggested_projects.title: Task Management Backend System
suggested_projects.description: Develop a complete task management API with full CRUD operations, user assignments, priority levels, deadlines, and filtering capabilities with a relational database.

suggested_projects.title: Microservices Architecture Application
suggested_projects.description: Design and implement a microservices-based system with separate services for users, products, and orders communicating via REST APIs with Docker containerization.

careers.title: Software Engineer
careers.description: Software Engineers apply engineering principles to design, develop, test, and maintain software systems across a wide range of domains and technology stacks. Unlike narrower roles, Software Engineers are expected to contribute across multiple layers of an application, reason about system design, write production-quality code, and participate in architectural decisions. They are one of the most broadly hired roles in the Indian IT industry.
learning_prerequisites: Mathematical foundations: discrete mathematics and basic probability
Introduction to computer science concepts (binary, memory, processes)
Basic programming in any language
Understanding of what software development workflows look like

certifications.name: Oracle Certified Professional: Java SE Developer

suggested_projects.title: Library Management System
suggested_projects.description: Build a console-based or web-based library management system with CRUD operations, search, and cataloging using OOP principles and a relational database.

suggested_projects.title: Online Examination Platform
suggested_projects.description: Develop a web-based exam platform with timed quizzes, question randomization, auto-grading, result analytics, and role-based access for students and administrators.

suggested_projects.title: Distributed Cache System
suggested_projects.description: Implement a simplified distributed key-value cache system demonstrating understanding of system design principles, consistency, and distributed computing concepts.

careers.title: Data Analyst
careers.description: Data Analysts collect, process, and interpret large datasets to help organizations make evidence-based decisions. They build dashboards, perform statistical analyses, identify trends, and communicate insights to non-technical stakeholders through visualizations and reports. Data Analysts serve as the bridge between raw business data and actionable strategic recommendations.
learning_prerequisites: Basic mathematics and statistics (mean, median, standard deviation, probability)
Introduction to spreadsheets and data tables
Basic programming concepts in any language
Understanding of business data contexts (sales, operations, marketing)

certifications.name: Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300)

suggested_projects.title: Sales Performance Dashboard
suggested_projects.description: Analyze a public retail sales dataset, clean and transform the data using Python and Pandas, and build an interactive dashboard displaying key performance metrics.

suggested_projects.title: Customer Churn Analysis
suggested_projects.description: Perform end-to-end exploratory data analysis on a customer churn dataset, identify key churn indicators, build visualizations, and present findings in a structured report.

suggested_projects.title: Multi-Source Business Intelligence Report
suggested_projects.description: Combine data from multiple public datasets, build a comprehensive BI report using SQL transformations and Tableau or Power BI, with executive-level storytelling.

careers.title: Data Engineer
careers.description: Data Engineers design, build, and maintain the infrastructure and pipelines that move, transform, and store data at scale. They are responsible for ensuring data flows reliably and efficiently from source systems to data warehouses and analytical platforms, enabling Data Analysts and Data Scientists to access clean, structured data. Data Engineering is one of the fastest-growing and highest-paying data roles in the industry.
learning_prerequisites: Strong SQL fundamentals including joins, aggregations, and window functions
Python programming with a focus on scripting and automation
Basic understanding of distributed systems and cloud concepts
Familiarity with relational and non-relational databases

suggested_projects.title: Automated Data Pipeline with Python
suggested_projects.description: Build an automated ETL pipeline that extracts data from a public API, transforms it using Pandas, loads it into a local SQL database, and schedules runs using a simple scheduler.

suggested_projects.title: Batch Data Processing with Apache Spark
suggested_projects.description: Process a large public dataset using Apache Spark, perform aggregations and transformations, and store the processed results in a cloud data warehouse.

suggested_projects.title: Real-Time Streaming Data Pipeline
suggested_projects.description: Build a real-time data pipeline using Apache Kafka for event streaming, process events with Python, and store aggregated results in a cloud database with a monitoring dashboard.

careers.title: AI/ML Engineer
careers.description: AI/ML Engineers design, build, and deploy machine learning models and AI systems that power intelligent applications. They bridge the gap between research-level machine learning and production-ready software, handling everything from data preprocessing and model training to deployment, monitoring, and optimization. This is one of the most in-demand and highest-compensated technical roles in the global technology industry.
learning_prerequisites: Strong foundation in mathematics: linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics
Proficient Python programming including NumPy and Pandas
Basic understanding of algorithms and data structures
Conceptual understanding of how neural networks learn

suggested_projects.title: Sentiment Analysis Classifier
suggested_projects.description: Build a text sentiment analysis model using Scikit-learn or a pre-trained model trained on a public review dataset, with a simple web interface to test predictions.

suggested_projects.title: Image Classification with Deep Learning
suggested_projects.description: Train a convolutional neural network using TensorFlow or PyTorch to classify images from a public dataset with data augmentation and model performance visualization.

suggested_projects.title: End-to-End ML Pipeline with Deployment
suggested_projects.description: Build a complete machine learning pipeline from data ingestion through model training, evaluation, and deployment as a REST API endpoint with monitoring capability.

career_stage_path.senior_role: Senior ML Engineer / AI Research Lead

careers.title: Cloud Engineer
careers.description: Cloud Engineers design, implement, and manage cloud infrastructure and services that host modern applications at scale. They work with cloud providers to architect solutions for compute, storage, networking, security, and cost optimization. Cloud Engineers ensure that applications are highly available, scalable, and resilient, and increasingly use infrastructure-as-code tools to automate environment provisioning.
learning_prerequisites: Basic understanding of computer networking (IP, DNS, HTTP, TCP/IP)
Familiarity with Linux command line operations
Basic programming or scripting knowledge (Python or Bash)
Conceptual understanding of virtual machines and containers

suggested_projects.title: Static Website Deployment on AWS S3
suggested_projects.description: Deploy a static website using AWS S3 and CloudFront, configure HTTPS, and set up basic access logging and cost alerts.

suggested_projects.title: Infrastructure Provisioning with Terraform
suggested_projects.description: Use Terraform to provision a complete AWS environment with a VPC, subnets, EC2 instances, security groups, and an RDS database as infrastructure-as-code.

suggested_projects.title: Auto-Scaling Web Application Architecture
suggested_projects.description: Architect and deploy a containerized web application on AWS with auto-scaling groups, load balancing, health monitoring, and automated backup using cloud-native services.

career_stage_path.senior_role: Senior Cloud Engineer / Cloud Solutions Architect

careers.title: DevOps Engineer
careers.description: DevOps Engineers bridge software development and IT operations by automating the software delivery pipeline from code commit through testing, deployment, and monitoring. They implement CI/CD pipelines, manage containerized infrastructure, ensure system reliability, and embed security into the development lifecycle. DevOps is the operational backbone of modern cloud-native software delivery.
learning_prerequisites: Solid Linux administration and command line proficiency
Basic understanding of networking (ports, protocols, firewalls)
Scripting fundamentals in Python or Bash
Familiarity with software development lifecycle and version control

certifications.name: IBM DevOps and Software Engineering Professional Certificate

suggested_projects.title: Dockerized Application Setup
suggested_projects.description: Containerize an existing web application using Docker, create a docker-compose configuration for local development with a database, and document the setup process.

suggested_projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions
suggested_projects.description: Build an automated CI/CD pipeline for a web application using GitHub Actions, including automated testing, Docker image building, and deployment to a cloud environment.

suggested_projects.title: Kubernetes Cluster Deployment and Monitoring
suggested_projects.description: Deploy a multi-service application on a Kubernetes cluster with Helm charts, set up Prometheus and Grafana for monitoring, configure alerts, and implement rolling deployments.

careers.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
careers.description: Cybersecurity Analysts protect an organization's digital assets by monitoring systems for threats, investigating security incidents, conducting vulnerability assessments, and implementing defensive controls. They work at the intersection of IT infrastructure, risk management, and compliance, and are responsible for ensuring that organizational data and systems remain confidential, available, and intact.
learning_prerequisites: Solid understanding of computer networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, firewalls)
Basic Linux command line proficiency
Introduction to operating system concepts (processes, memory, file systems)
Basic programming or scripting knowledge

suggested_projects.title: Home Lab Network Security Setup
suggested_projects.description: Set up a virtual home lab with multiple VMs, configure network segmentation, enable logging, and perform basic scanning using Nmap and Wireshark to understand network traffic patterns.

suggested_projects.title: Web Application Vulnerability Assessment
suggested_projects.description: Perform a structured vulnerability assessment on a deliberately vulnerable web application (DVWA or WebGoat), document findings, and propose remediation using OWASP methodology.

suggested_projects.title: Security Operations Center (SOC) Simulation
suggested_projects.description: Build a simulated SOC environment using open-source SIEM tools, ingest log data from multiple sources, create detection rules, and simulate and investigate a security incident.

career_stage_path.entry_role: Junior Security Analyst / SOC Analyst L1

careers.title: UI/UX Designer
careers.description: UI/UX Designers create the visual and experiential design of digital products, ensuring that interfaces are intuitive, accessible, and aesthetically compelling. UX focuses on user research, information architecture, and interaction design, while UI focuses on the visual implementation of those designs. Modern UI/UX Designers must bridge both disciplines and collaborate closely with engineering and product teams.
learning_prerequisites: Basic understanding of human psychology and how users think and behave
Familiarity with visual design concepts (layout, hierarchy, contrast)
Introduction to design thinking methodology
Comfort with computer applications and cloud-based collaboration tools

suggested_projects.title: Mobile App UI Redesign
suggested_projects.description: Select a real or hypothetical mobile app with poor UX, conduct a heuristic evaluation, and redesign 5 to 8 key screens with improved information architecture and visual design in Figma.

suggested_projects.title: End-to-End UX Research and Prototype
suggested_projects.description: Conduct user interviews, affinity mapping, create user personas and journey maps, then build a mid-fidelity interactive prototype for a new product concept using Figma.

suggested_projects.title: Design System for a Web Application
suggested_projects.description: Build a comprehensive design system including a component library, typography scale, color palette, spacing guidelines, and interaction patterns for a medium-complexity web application.

career_stage_path.senior_role: Senior Product Designer / Head of Design

careers.title: Mobile App Developer
careers.description: Mobile App Developers build applications for smartphones and tablets, targeting Android, iOS, or both platforms simultaneously using cross-platform frameworks. They are responsible for delivering smooth, responsive, and battery-efficient user experiences, handling device-specific APIs for notifications, cameras, and sensors, and publishing applications to the Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
learning_prerequisites: JavaScript programming fundamentals
Basic understanding of mobile UI conventions (gestures, navigation patterns)
Familiarity with how REST APIs work
Introduction to version control with Git

certifications.name: Flutter and Dart – The Complete Flutter App Development Course

suggested_projects.title: To-Do List Mobile Application
suggested_projects.description: Build a cross-platform to-do list app using React Native or Flutter with task creation, editing, deletion, completion tracking, and local storage persistence.

suggested_projects.title: News Reader App with API Integration
suggested_projects.description: Build a mobile news reader app that fetches articles from a public news API, supports category filtering, bookmarking, and push notification support for breaking news.

suggested_projects.title: Social Media Mobile Application
suggested_projects.description: Develop a feature-rich social media app with user authentication, post creation with media uploads, a real-time feed, comments, likes, and profile management using Firebase.
